summary: Admin/CRM Refactor Pass 2 - Tested 4 core admin operational pages (Payments Queue, Invoices, Orders, Quotes & Requests). Fixed critical backend route ordering issue that was blocking Orders page. All 20 backend API tests pass. All 4 frontend pages working correctly with table-first pattern and right-hand detail drawer.

fixed.issue: Route was being intercepted by admin_router's /api/admin/orders/{order_id} route (where order_id='list') which required authentication. Fixed by moving admin_facade_router inclusion BEFORE admin_router in server.py

critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering in server.py is critical - facade routes with specific paths like /orders/list must be registered BEFORE routes with path parameters like /orders/{order_id} to avoid interception
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin/CRM Refactor Pass 2 complete. All 4 new admin pages (Payments Queue at /admin/finance-queue, Invoices at /admin/invoices, Orders at /admin/orders, Quotes at /admin/quotes) are working. Backend facade routes at /api/admin/* are all functional. Route ordering fix applied in server.py - admin_facade_router now included before admin_router.

features: Filter bar with search and status filter
Unpaid alert banner shows (TZS 11,466,580 across 64 invoices)
Clicking row opens detail drawer with invoice info, proofs, linked order
Tab switching works (All Orders, Awaiting Release, Released, Completed)
Clicking row opens detail drawer with order items, vendor orders, events, commissions
Release to Vendor button in drawer
Unified table with 48 quotes + leads + service requests
Type badges shown (Quote, service_bundle_request, promotional_bundle_request, promotional_material_customization)

backend_api_tests.payments_queue: PASS - GET /api/admin/payments/queue returns array with search/status filters
backend_api_tests.invoices_list: PASS - GET /api/admin/invoices/list returns array with source_type, rejection_reason enrichment
backend_api_tests.invoice_detail: PASS - GET /api/admin/invoices/{id} returns invoice with payments, proofs, linked order
backend_api_tests.orders_list: PASS - GET /api/admin/orders/list returns array with release_state, vendor_count, sales_owner enrichment
backend_api_tests.orders_tabs: PASS - tab=awaiting_release, tab=released, tab=completed filters work
backend_api_tests.order_detail: PASS - GET /api/admin/orders/{id} returns order with items, vendor_orders, events, commissions
backend_api_tests.quotes_list: PASS - GET /api/admin/quotes/list returns unified quotes + leads + service requests
backend_api_tests.pending_actions: PASS - GET /api/admin/dashboard/pending-actions returns pending proofs and quotes
